=== write_memory ===
Create or update a durable personal memory by key. Prefer updating an existing key over creating near-duplicates. Use short, stable keys that describe the fact clearly (e.g. user_name, preferred_editor). Only store stable facts that may matter in future conversations, not temporary chat context or obvious details already visible in the current prompt. Use this to overwrite a stale or incorrect memory by writing the corrected value to the same key. Do not call repeatedly without clear reason.
=== delete_memory ===
Delete a stored memory by key when it is outdated, incorrect, stale, or no longer useful. Do not call repeatedly without clear reason.
=== search_memory ===
Search stored memories semantically. Use before guessing or writing duplicate memories. Query when you need prior context that is not visible in the current prompt, or when you suspect a relevant memory already exists. Do not call repeatedly without clear reason.
